news.title:
Nifty surged over 23,000; Sensex rose 1,681.7 pts as markets gained amid Iran-U.S. negotiation hopes.
InterGlobe Aviation, L&T, UltraTech Cement led gains; Coal India, Power Grid lagged; India VIX dropped 6.3%.
news.summary:
Nifty surged over 23,000; Sensex rose 1,681.7 pts as markets gained amid Iran-U.S. negotiation hopes.
InterGlobe Aviation, L&T, UltraTech Cement led gains; Coal India, Power Grid lagged; India VIX dropped 6.3%.

news.title:
JPMorgan rates Power Grid Corp Overweight with Rs 319 target citing improved execution.
Strong RoE and defensive model noted, but FY26 guidance upgrade remains modest with no major FY27–28 changes.
news.summary:
JPMorgan rates Power Grid Corp Overweight with Rs 319 target citing improved execution.
Strong RoE and defensive model noted, but FY26 guidance upgrade remains modest with no major FY27–28 changes.

news.title:
Elara Capital gives Buy on Power Grid with Rs 360 target, citing FY26 capex of Rs 350bn.
Strong Rs 15tn project pipeline, Rs 1.5tn order book and Rs 490bn CWIP boost growth visibility.
news.summary:
Elara Capital gives Buy on Power Grid with Rs 360 target, citing FY26 capex of Rs 350bn.
Strong Rs 15tn project pipeline, Rs 1.5tn order book and Rs 490bn CWIP boost growth visibility.

news.title:
MOSL rates Power Grid neutral with Rs 302 target; FY26 capex/capitalisation guidance rises to Rs 350bn/250bn.
FY27/28 forecasts unchanged; growth contingent on securing new project wins.
news.summary:
MOSL rates Power Grid neutral with Rs 302 target; FY26 capex/capitalisation guidance rises to Rs 350bn/250bn.
FY27/28 forecasts unchanged; growth contingent on securing new project wins.

news.title:
CERC directs RECPDCL to reimburse acquisition cost paid by PGCIL for the Vemagiri Transmission System SPV.
CERC criticized RECPDCL for not deferring the process despite force majeure; liability placed on RECPDCL over PGCIL.
news.summary:
CERC directs RECPDCL to reimburse acquisition cost paid by PGCIL for the Vemagiri Transmission System SPV.
CERC criticized RECPDCL for not deferring the process despite force majeure; liability placed on RECPDCL over PGCIL.

news.title:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.
news.summary:
UBS upgrades Power Grid, NTPC, NHPC to 'Buy', citing defensive play and summer demand boost.
Target prices raised: Power Grid Rs 340, NTPC Rs 432, NHPC Rs 88; robust growth visibility cited.

news.title:
Power Grid Corp raises FY26 CAPEX guidance to ₹350B from ₹320B.
FY26 capitalization guidance also increased to ₹250B from ₹220B.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corp raises FY26 CAPEX guidance to ₹350B from ₹320B.
FY26 capitalization guidance also increased to ₹250B from ₹220B.

news.title:
Power Grid held a webinar on Mar 23, 2026, discussing growth, financials, and execution.
Capex plan exceeds ₹1L Cr; transmission expansion supports India's green energy goals.
news.summary:
Power Grid held a webinar on Mar 23, 2026, discussing growth, financials, and execution.
Capex plan exceeds ₹1L Cr; transmission expansion supports India's green energy goals.

news.title:
BofA Securities turns bullish on utilities, upgrading Power Grid, NTPC, and NHPC to 'Buy'.
The upgrade reflects positive sentiment towards the utilities sector, as reported by CNBC TV18.
news.summary:
BofA Securities turns bullish on utilities, upgrading Power Grid, NTPC, and NHPC to 'Buy'.
The upgrade reflects positive sentiment towards the utilities sector, as reported by CNBC TV18.

news.title:
Power Grid shares rose 2.7% after board approved merging 28 subsidiaries to streamline operations.
Q3FY25 profit dropped 4.1% YoY; board approved ₹705.3cr investment in transformers, reactors.
news.summary:
Power Grid shares rose 2.7% after board approved merging 28 subsidiaries to streamline operations.
Q3FY25 profit dropped 4.1% YoY; board approved ₹705.3cr investment in transformers, reactors.

news.title:
Powergrid gets approval to merge 28 subsidiaries to streamline structure.
The merger aims to enhance operational efficiency for Powergrid.
news.summary:
Powergrid gets approval to merge 28 subsidiaries to streamline structure.
The merger aims to enhance operational efficiency for Powergrid.

news.title:
Power Grid's board approved procurement of cold spare transformers and reactors.
The project, costing ₹705.3 Cr, is expected to complete within 30 months.
news.summary:
Power Grid's board approved procurement of cold spare transformers and reactors.
The project, costing ₹705.3 Cr, is expected to complete within 30 months.

news.title:
HSBC upgraded Power Grid to 'hold' with a revised target price of Rs 290, citing faster project execution and BESS opportunities.
Policy changes, intra-state transmission projects, and BESS integration boost growth, but execution risks and competition remain.
news.summary:
HSBC upgraded Power Grid to 'hold' with a revised target price of Rs 290, citing faster project execution and BESS opportunities.
Policy changes, intra-state transmission projects, and BESS integration boost growth, but execution risks and competition remain.

news.title:
Power Grid Corp will host a webinar on 23rd March 2026 for analysts and investors.
Management will share business updates, featuring top executives including Dr. R.K. Tyagi and Shri G. Ravisankar.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corp will host a webinar on 23rd March 2026 for analysts and investors.
Management will share business updates, featuring top executives including Dr. R.K. Tyagi and Shri G. Ravisankar.

news.title:
Power Grid Corp acquired NES Pune East New Transmission Ltd for Rs. 8.05 Cr.
The acquisition aims to expand the power transmission network in Maharashtra.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corp acquired NES Pune East New Transmission Ltd for Rs. 8.05 Cr.
The acquisition aims to expand the power transmission network in Maharashtra.

news.title:
RailTel Corp secures Rs 115-cr order from Power Grid Corp.
Promoters have no interest; execution by 10 Sep 2034; not a related-party deal.
news.summary:
RailTel Corp secures Rs 115-cr order from Power Grid Corp.
Promoters have no interest; execution by 10 Sep 2034; not a related-party deal.

news.title:
Power Grid approved Rs. 5,000 Cr term loan from Union Bank.
Rs. 234 Cr sanctioned for security center; CTUIL stake sale approved.
news.summary:
Power Grid approved Rs. 5,000 Cr term loan from Union Bank.
Rs. 234 Cr sanctioned for security center; CTUIL stake sale approved.

news.title:
Power Grid Corp granted regulatory relaxation by SEBI, easing operational constraints.
The move aims to facilitate smoother corporate governance for Power Grid Corp.
news.summary:
Power Grid Corp granted regulatory relaxation by SEBI, easing operational constraints.
The move aims to facilitate smoother corporate governance for Power Grid Corp.

news.title:
POWERGRID's board meeting on March 9, 2026, to discuss fund raising plans.
Trading window closed March 4-11, reopening March 12, per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
POWERGRID's board meeting on March 9, 2026, to discuss fund raising plans.
Trading window closed March 4-11, reopening March 12, per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
PM Modi inaugurated ₹3,600 cr Powergrid projects in Rajasthan to enhance solar energy transmission.
Projects include a transmission system for evacuating 20 GW from REZ, featuring Bhadla III substation and Sikar II line.
news.summary:
PM Modi inaugurated ₹3,600 cr Powergrid projects in Rajasthan to enhance solar energy transmission.
Projects include a transmission system for evacuating 20 GW from REZ, featuring Bhadla III substation and Sikar II line.
